---
name: Project milestone status
description: Current state of Colmena milestones — M0 done, M0.5 done, M1 in progress as of 2026-03-29
type: project
---

**M0 — Trust Firewall + Approval Hub:** Complete and hardened. Pushed to GitLab 2026-03-29.

**M0.5 — Workspace refactor + MCP server:** Complete as of 2026-03-29. Rust workspace with 3 crates (colmena-core, colmena-cli, colmena-mcp). MCP server registered in `.mcp.json`, exposes 4 tools via rmcp/stdio (config_check, queue_list, delegate, evaluate). 77 tests across workspace.

**M1 — Wisdom Library + Pattern Selector:** In progress. Core modules implemented: `library.rs` (role/pattern CRUD), `selector.rs` (pattern scoring + mission generation). Library data in `config/library/` with 4 roles (pentester, auditor, researcher, security-architect), 6 patterns (oracle-workers, debate, pipeline, etc.), and 4 prompt templates. Remaining: MCP tool exposure for library/selector, end-to-end mission launch flow.

**Why:** Milestones build on each other. Understanding current state prevents re-doing completed work.
**How to apply:** Next work should finish M1 MCP integration or start M2 Knowledge Bus planning.

reason: No matching rule — falling back to default
